LightningMessageChannel.description: Broadcasts onboarding tab state: visibility, current phase, and record IDs for sidebar components

lightningMessageFields.description: true when the onboarding tab is active, false when navigating away
Currently selected phase step (overview, pre-phase, phase-1, phase-2, phase-3, phase-4)
Account record Id from the page
Onboarding__c record Id (null if no onboarding exists)
Touchpoint key to navigate to and expand (e.g. ihc1, kickoff, f2f, tlgate) or sidebar panel name (successPlan)
